title: Topics in Algebra (3TA)

prerequisites.text: MAM2010F, MAM2011F, and two of MAM2012S, MAM2013S and MAM2014S.

outline: This course provides an introduction to order and lattice theory. Topics include: lattices and order, congruences, distributivity and Boolean algebras, representation theory, naive set theory, and universal algebra.
lecture_times: Tuesdays, Fridays and some Wednesdays in 5th period.
